message:
test(pipeline): add dependency graph validation and resume tests

deps_test.go:
- TestFindUnreachable: detect MISSING_DEPENDENCY error for nonexistent dep
- TestResolve_WithCycle: verify cycle detection returns invalid plan with
  CYCLE error code
- TestResolve_WithLevels: verify level assignment and topological order
  (parallel steps at same level, deps before dependents)

executor_test.go:
- TestResume_WithPriorState: verify executor resumes from prior state,
  preserves variables, skips completed steps, continues from checkpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
